name: OCM Genesis by OnChainMonkey®
description: OCM Genesis is the first 10K Ordinals Collection inscribed on Bitcoin, with the groundbreaking use of Parent-Child Provenance, Recursion, and Reinscription, setting the standard for on-chain digital assets on the highest-value blockchain. Inscribed on rare Block 9, 450x sats, the first Bitcoin mined by Satoshi and sent to Hal Finney.
